modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Problem with setting up shared email account in macOS Outlook

full_description_text:  
I am trying to set up a shared email account in Outlook on my macOS. It’s not working and I don’t know why. I need help with this shared email account setup. Please assist me with this issue.
short_description: Problem with setting up shared email account in macOS Outlook
description: I am trying to set up a shared email account in Outlook on my macOS. It’s not working and I don’t know why. I need help with this shared email account setup. Please assist me with this issue.
